description:
Evaluate five solvent candidates for a pharmaceutical extraction process using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/).

Candidates:
1. Dichloromethane (CAS 75-09-2)
2. Chloroform (CAS 67-66-3)
3. Carbon Tetrachloride (CAS 56-23-5)
4. Trichloroethylene (CAS 79-01-6)
5. 1,2-Dichloroethane (CAS 107-06-2)

Selection Criteria:
1. Phase Separation: Must be denser than water (Specific Gravity > 1.0).
2. Fire Safety: Must be Non-Flammable (Flash Point > 140°F/60°C OR listed as 'Not flammable'/'Data unavailable' but non-combustible).
3. Optimization: Among safe, dense candidates, select the one with the LOWEST Boiling Point.

Extract the Specific Gravity, Flash Point, and Boiling Point for each chemical and create a report at '~/Documents/solvent_selection_report.txt' with the data for all candidates and your final selection.

The report format must be:

CANDIDATE SUMMARY
--------------------------------------------------
Dichloromethane: SG=[val], FP=[val], BP=[val]
Chloroform: SG=[val], FP=[val], BP=[val]
Carbon Tetrachloride: SG=[val], FP=[val], BP=[val]
Trichloroethylene: SG=[val], FP=[val], BP=[val]
1,2-Dichloroethane: SG=[val], FP=[val], BP=[val]
--------------------------------------------------

FINAL SELECTION
Selected Solvent: [Name]
Reason: [Brief explanation]
